description: A software-based business that solves a recurring problem through a web tool, automation workflow, or lightweight application.
best_for: Users with coding ability or strong product-building support
Users who can identify a repetitive and painful workflow
Users able to scope a very small MVP
bad_for: Users with no technical support and no interest in product iteration
Users who want to build a large platform immediately
mvp_examples: A narrow dashboard for one role
evaluation_points: Is the target problem repetitive and expensive enough to solve?
Can the first version focus on one workflow only?
Can users understand the value in under a minute?
starter_next_steps: Build only the smallest useful function
Test with a few real users before expanding
